# Per-file GROWTH-RATCHET CEILINGS for the grandfathered over-cap modules (story S1 / 9cf3).
#
# Format: "<repo-relative-path> <max-lines>". The module-size gate (in BOTH
# .github/workflows/gerrit-verify.yaml — the gating `Verified` vote — and
# .github/workflows/test.yml — the mirror/branch CI) FAILS when an allow-listed file
# EXCEEDS its pinned ceiling: a grandfathered file cannot creep upward. Shrinking is always
# free — lower the number when you shed lines, and graduate a file off BOTH this file and
# `.github/module-size-allowlist.txt` once it drops back under the 800 soft cap. Raising a
# ceiling or adding a row is a deliberate, reviewed act with a docs/architecture.md remedy
# row. Membership (which files are soft-cap-exempt) is the sibling bare-path allowlist; the
# two are kept in sync by tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py.
#
# NOTE (transient): reconcile.py is pinned to 1083 = its largest size across the in-flight
# janitor stack (it ratchets down to 1064 as the reconciler decomposition lands); the slack
# lets the ratchet stay green if the stack lands piecemeal rather than atomically.
#
# NOTE (epic foliaged-merry-collie — review-gate impact redesign): det_floor.py 849->946 (the G5
# store-derived decomposition signal, child spangly-beggarly-blackrhino) and passes.py 839->852
# (the Pass-1 finding-memory recall, child disused-unpoliced-solenodon) grew for the impact-redesign
# epic; their ceilings are raised here to the landed size (remedy rows already in architecture.md).
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_differ.py 806
src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/reconcile.py 1083
src/rebar/config.py 839
src/rebar/llm/plan_review/attest.py 843
src/rebar/llm/plan_review/det_floor.py 946
src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py 852
src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_refs.py 870
